nasb.text: Then David did so, just as the Lord had commanded him, and struck down the Philistines from Geba as far as Gezer.

esv.text: And David did as the Lord commanded him, and struck down the Philistines from Geba to Gezer.

cnv.text: 於是大衛照著耶和華所吩咐他的去作，擊殺非利士人，從迦巴直到基色。

ccb.text: 大卫遵命而行，打败非利士人，由迦巴一直杀到基色。
